description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Solid Wood Chestnut Wall Mounted Open Woven Bedside, 1 Drawer, 1 Shelf, Dark Brown

Main Color:Brown

Main Material:Solid Wood

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (cm):32.00

Assembled Width (cm):45.00

Assembled Height (cm):25.00

Product Weight (kg):7.50

Package Size

Length (cm):55.00

Width (cm):42.00

Height (cm):35.00

Weight (kg):9.00

Product Features

  • Crafted from Eco-Friendly 100% Solid Mango Wood —— bring the cozy, natural warmth of tropical wood into your living room, dining area, or bedroom.
  • The warm, rich chestnut finish enhances the wood's natural grain, offering a classic and inviting look.
  • Features one spacious drawer to discreetly tuck away remotes, chargers, and other living room essentials.
  • The clean white and warm oak-ish combination creates a bright, contemporary, and naturally inviting style.
  • A space-saving wall-mounted design that frees up valuable floor space, perfect for smaller rooms.
  • Delivered fully assembled for your convenience, ready to be enjoyed in your home right out of the box.
